response.overview: Ta Dutdotmo Kalilibnusan follows Duds, a once-promising painter who now survives on small painting jobs to make ends meet. He lives a quiet but difficult life with his devoted wife, Feling, whose sacrifices keep their household afloat. As his health declines and his hands begin to tremble, Duds struggles with a growing creative block and withdraws from the people around him.  His attention becomes consumed by an unfinished painting of a waterfalls and the image of a mysterious woman who repeatedly appears in his thoughts and visions. Believing that she holds the key to completing his work, Duds becomes increasingly obsessed with finding her.  While Feling continues to care for him and fight for their relationship, Duds loses his grip on reality and spirals toward violence and self-destruction. The film is a story about trauma, memory, and the devastating consequences of wounds left unhealed.
response.title: Ta Dutdot Mo Kalilibnusan
